# QA Plan: Sprint 25 — Phase B Damage Model + Presentation Assurance
**Date**: 2026-06-17
**Generated by**: /qa-plan
**Scope**: 14 stories across Platform Editor damage columns (Req 21 / ADR-011 Phase B closeout), Database Intelligence (Req 06), C2 Map Presentation (ADR-007), Doctrine EMCON read-only (Req 13 regression), Sprint 24 stretch carry-over
**Engine**: Unity 6.3 LTS (C# / .NET 8 headless for Data/CLI/Sim; PlayMode for Unity adapter) — `.claude/docs/technical-preferences.md` not fully configured
**Sprint File**: `production/sprints/sprint-25-phase-b-damage-assurance.md`
**Trunk**: `main` @ `9ecbf2c` (Sprint 24 stack merged; 592/592 baseline; ReplayGolden 6/6)
**Sprint Dates**: 2026-08-07 → 2026-08-20
**Review mode**: **Lean** — Buildkite `buildkite/cmano-clone` = merge authority; GitHub Actions CodeQL advisory (billing); Unity Editor evidence = **advisory gates** (headless PASS required; Editor evidence clears conditions)
**Sprint Goal**: Close ADR-011 Phase B by landing damage-model columns on the Platforms sheet through the full Excel write-gate round-trip (tracker row 21 complete); merge Sprint 24 stretch carry-over (S24-10 EMCON panel, S24-11 ClosedXML UX); close presentation assurance gaps (Cesium Editor evidence, C2 tri-batch sign-off, APP-6 glyph atlas foundation) while maintaining **≥592** full-solution tests and **6/6** replay goldens.

---

## Test Summary

| Story | Type | Automated Test Required | Manual Verification Required |
|-------|------|------------------------|------------------------------|
| S25-01 Full-solution re-baseline (25-1) | Integration (CI/Config) | Yes — `dotnet build` + `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln` 0 failures; count ≥592 recorded; ReplayGolden 6/6 | Evidence review: `production/qa/smoke-sprint-25-*.md` with indexed commit + pass count; GitNexus analyze @ trunk |
| S25-02 Damage schema migration `009` (25-2) | Integration + Logic | Yes — migration idempotent; Baltic fixture seeded; `CatalogPlatformDamage` types; no new workbook sheets | Schema sign-off: producer-approved column set before merge |
| S25-03 Damage reader + export (25-3) | Integration + Logic | Yes — `ICatalogReader.TryGetPlatformDamage`; Platforms sheet damage columns in export; reader tests PASS | CLI spot-check: export payload includes damage fields from DB |
| S25-04 Damage write-gate commit (25-4) | Integration + Logic | Yes — extend-only `ProposePlatformDamageBatch` + `ApproveBatch`/`RejectBatch`; sensor + Phase A/B regression; `WriteGate` filter green | GitNexus impact on `CatalogWriteGate` (CRITICAL, extend-only) archived before edit |
| S25-05 Damage importer E2E (25-5) | Integration + Logic | Yes — diff/stage/approve damage column edits; empty-diff golden; FK guard on `PlatformId` | Manual E2E: export → edit `MaxHp` → import → approve → read-back |
| S25-06 Damage validator rule pack (25-6) | Integration + Logic | Yes — HP bounds, withdraw threshold, flag sanity; validation hash golden pinned | Spot-check validation report codes on fixture with deliberate damage errors |
| S25-07 S24-11 ClosedXML carryover (25-7) | Integration + Logic | Yes — merge `stack/sprint24/closedxml-phase-b-ux`; Emcon enum dropdowns + binary golden; `Data.Excel.Tests` PASS | Update golden if Platforms damage columns shift layout |
| S25-08 APP-6 glyph atlas MVP (25-8) | UI + Integration + Visual | Yes — expand `App6Sidc`; USS/atlas-backed map glyphs (≥2 distinct icons); headless App6 + MapPanel tests PASS | Spike doc PROCEED verdict; screenshot of 2 distinct glyphs |
| S25-09 Cesium Editor evidence (25-9) | Visual + Integration | Yes — `useGlobeMap=false` default on `DelegationSmoke`; headless C2 regression unchanged | **Advisory gate**: `cesium-s25-*.png` in attachments; S24-08 manual protocol executed |
| S25-10 S24-10 EMCON panel merge (25-10) | UI + Integration | Yes — rebase `doctrine-emcon-readonly`; Doctrine batch PASS; ZERO touch `DelegationBridge` | Read-only EMCON line visible on doctrine panel (Editor or harness evidence) |
| S25-11 C2 Editor tri-batch sign-off (25-11) | UI + Integration + Visual | Yes — headless `PlayModeSmoke\|Doctrine\|MapPanelBinder` filter green | **Advisory gate**: `Invoke-C2PlayModeSignoffBatch.ps1` comms/classify/doctrine; log archived; no `SIGNOFF_ERROR` |
| S25-12 Closeout hygiene (25-12) | Integration (tooling) | Yes — replay 6/6; GitNexus @ stack tip; tracker row 21 Phase B complete; CI branch cleanup | Evidence: `production/qa/sprint-25-gitnexus-*.md`; stale `stack/sprint24/*` pruned |
| S25-13 Damage sim consumer stub (25-13) | Integration + Logic | Yes — `TryGetPlatformDamage` readiness/withdraw smoke; Sim tests PASS | `/replay-verify` if merged; legacy fixtures without damage unchanged |
| S25-14 Cesium APP-6 billboards (25-14) | Visual + Integration | Yes — globe markers use `App6Sidc` affiliation; `useGlobeMap: 0` on DelegationSmoke | **Advisory gate**: Editor evidence updated; headless smoke PASS |

*(Types inferred from sprint kickoff — stories inline; no individual story files yet. Gap: lead-programmer should add explicit `Type:` before `/dev-story`.)*

**GDD section notes:**
- Req 21 (Platform Editor): No standalone **Formulas** or **Edge Cases** sections — test cases derived from PLE-* functional ACs, ADR-011 verification bullets, and sprint damage-column ACs (`MaxHp`, withdraw threshold, critical flags).
- Req 06 (Database Intelligence): No standalone **Formulas** or **Edge Cases** sections — test cases derived from DBI-* functional ACs and resolved design decisions (§1–§7).
- Req 13 (Doctrine): **Acceptance Criteria** AC1–AC6 used for **regression only** on S25-10/S25-11; no new doctrine features in S25 scope.
- Req 18 (Combat Domains): Platform HP + critical flags referenced for catalog export only — **no runtime damage application** (explicitly out of scope).
- `docs/architecture/control-manifest.md` not found — GitNexus impact + ADR-010/011 govern forbidden patterns.

## Automated Tests Required

### S25-01 Full-solution re-baseline — Integration (CI/Config)

**Test file path**: N/A (solution-wide gate — evidence in `production/qa/smoke-sprint-25-*.md`)

**What to test** (from kickoff AC):
- `dotnet build ProjectAegis.sln` — 0 errors
- `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal` — 0 failures
- Total passed count ≥ **592** (S24 closeout baseline) recorded in evidence doc and `sprint-status.yaml` (`tests_passed_sprint25_baseline`)
- Indexed commit `9ecbf2c` (or day-1 HEAD) recorded
- `ReplayGoldenSuiteTests` — 6/6 PASS
- `npx gitnexus analyze . --force` @ trunk completes (S25-Q03)
- Day-1 gate blocks all feature work until green

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Flaky test quarantine (run `/test-flakiness` if intermittent)
- `ProjectAegis.Data.Excel` ClosedXML restore failure on clean CI agent
- Unity adapter test membership in sln — confirm actual count vs 592 baseline
- Post-merge delta: new tests added by S25 stories must not regress prior 592
- Buildkite green vs GHA CodeQL advisory fail — lean mode: Buildkite is blocking; CodeQL is advisory only

**Filters / commands**:
```bash
export PATH="/home/username01/.dotnet:$PATH"
dotnet build ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal
dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "ReplayGoldenSuiteTests" -v minimal
npx gitnexus analyze . --force
# Record: Passed ≥592, Failed 0, commit SHA → production/qa/smoke-sprint-25-*.md
```

**Estimated test count**: 0 new tests (baseline gate); mandatory re-run at sprint closeout

### S25-02 Damage schema migration `009` — Integration + Logic

**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Platform/CatalogPhaseBDamageMigrationTests.cs` (new); extend migration fixture tests under `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Migrations/`

**What to test** (from kickoff AC + GDD 21 Phase B + Req 06 DBI-1.1):
- Migration `009` is **additive** — platform damage columns on existing Platforms table / `catalog_platform_damage` staging; no new workbook sheets
- Idempotent re-run: second apply is no-op or safe upsert
- `CatalogPlatformDamage` type(s) map to schema columns (HP, withdraw threshold, critical flags per producer sign-off)
- Baltic fixture seeded with at least one platform damage row
- Phase A + Phase B (Mobility/Signatures/Emcon) tables regression unchanged after migration
- Migration ordering: `009` after `008`; rollback path documented if applicable

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Fresh DB vs upgraded DB from migration 008 — both paths green
- Platform with no damage row — reader returns default-empty (not exception)
- Duplicate migration apply on CI agent
- Column rename rejected — additive only per scope lock

**Filters / commands**:
```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "Platform|CatalogPhaseBDamage|Migration" -v minimal
npx gitnexus impact ICatalogReader --direction upstream
```

**Estimated test count**: ~6–8 (idempotent apply, Baltic seed, type mapping, Phase A/B regression, empty default)

---

### S25-03 Damage reader + export — Integration + Logic

**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Platform/CatalogPhaseBDamageReaderTests.cs` (new); extend `PlatformWorkbookPhaseBSheetTests.cs`; CLI integration in `src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests/`

**What to test** (from kickoff AC + GDD 21 PLE-1.3 + Req 06 DBI-1.1):
- `ICatalogReader.TryGetPlatformDamage` — additive API only; default-empty on `InMemoryCatalogReader`
- `SqliteCatalogReader` returns damage row from migration 009 tables after commit
- Stable `OrderBy` on `PlatformId` for Platforms sheet damage columns
- Export payload includes damage fields on **Platforms sheet** (not separate Damage sheet)
- CLI snapshot resolver returns **real** damage values from DB
- Export determinism: same snapshot → identical workbook ordering (`ICatalogClock` injectable)
- Phase B reader paths (Mobility/Signatures/Emcon) + Phase A reader regression unchanged
- GitNexus impact on `ICatalogReader` before edit (HIGH blast radius)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Empty damage table (zero rows) — export shows headers / default columns only
- Platform with damage but partial flags — all columns round-trip
- Unknown `PlatformId` — `TryGetPlatformDamage` returns false, no exception
- Cache invalidation after `ApproveBatch` (DBI-1.1)
- Platforms column shift from S25-07 ClosedXML merge — export column order stable

**Filters / commands**:
```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "Platform|CatalogPhaseB|CatalogPhaseBDamage" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "Mcp|Platform" -v minimal
npx gitnexus impact ICatalogReader --direction upstream
```

**Estimated test count**: ~8–12 (TryGet read, sort stability, empty tables, CLI resolver, cache invalidation, Phase A/B regression)

---

### S25-04 Damage write-gate commit — Integration + Logic

**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/WriteGate/CatalogWriteGatePhaseBDamageTests.cs` (new); extend `CatalogWriteGatePhaseBTests.cs` and `CatalogWriteGateTests.cs`

**What to test** (from kickoff AC + GDD 21 PLE-3.1–3.5 + GDD 06 DBI-1.4, DBI-4.4):
- `ProposePlatformDamageBatch` stages to damage staging table(s)
- `ApproveBatch` upserts staging → live tables; new snapshot / `db_release` row produced (PLE-3.5, DBI-4.3)
- `RejectBatch` discards damage staging; live tables unchanged (PLE-3.4, DBI-4.4)
- **CRITICAL extend-only**: sensor `ProposeSensorBatch` → `ApproveBatch` path regression unchanged
- Phase A entity commit paths regression unchanged
- Phase B Mobility/Signatures/Emcon commit paths regression unchanged (S24 foundation)
- Bulk >10 records → `Committed == false` until explicit human `ApproveBatch` (PLE-3.3, DBI-2.4)
- Change-log entries written per committed damage field (DBI-4.1)
- No direct-SQL or auto-commit bypass (PLE-3.1, DBI-8.3)
- GitNexus impact `CatalogWriteGate --direction upstream` **before any edit**

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Empty propose batch → rejected at staging (DBI-7.1 pattern)
- Orphan `PlatformId` in staged damage row → validation failure, not commit
- Partial batch: damage approved, mobility rejected — live damage unchanged until approve
- Concurrent `RejectBatch` after `ProposePlatformDamageBatch` — no orphan staging rows (DBI-1.4)
- `balanceCritical` field touch (e.g., `MaxHp`) forces human gate even under threshold

**Filters / commands**:
```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "WriteGate|Platform|CatalogPhaseB|CatalogPhaseBDamage" -v minimal
npx gitnexus impact CatalogWriteGate --direction upstream
# Sensor regression spot-check (mandatory before merge):
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "WriteGate&Sensor" -v minimal
```

**Estimated test count**: ~12–16 (propose/approve/reject, sensor regression, Phase A/B regression, bulk threshold, orphan guard, change-log)

---

### S25-05 Damage importer E2E — Integration + Logic

**Test file path**: extend `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Platform/PlatformWorkbookImporterTests.cs`; extend `PlatformWorkbookRoundTripTests.cs`; `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Excel.Tests/` for Platforms sheet damage column parity

**What to test** (from kickoff AC + GDD 21 PLE-2.1–2.4 + ADR-011):
- `PlatformWorkbookImporter` diffs Platforms sheet damage columns (PLE-2.1)
- Unedited round-trip → **empty diff** (no spurious changes) on damage columns — extends S24 Phase B golden pattern
- Edited `MaxHp` cell → stages `ProposePlatformDamageBatch`; approve → read-back matches edit
- FK guard on `PlatformId`: row with unknown platform → quarantine, never committed (PLE-2.3)
- Stale `SourceSnapshotId` → explainable reject (PLE-2.2)
- Explicit deletions surface as distinct diff category (PLE-2.4)
- Phase A + Phase B (Mobility/Signatures/Emcon) importer paths regression unchanged
- ClosedXML binary `.xlsx` round-trip parity with canonical text I/O

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Edit only withdraw threshold — single staged batch
- Edit damage flags without HP change — correct diff category
- Edit multiple Platforms columns (damage + mobility) in one workbook — batched correctly
- `InvariantCulture` parsing on numeric HP fields (ADR-011 locale risk)
- Empty damage columns (defaults only) — no spurious adds
- Large Baltic fixture round-trip performance
- Import with validation errors → `Stage` blocked, nothing proposed

**Filters / commands**:
```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "Platform|CatalogPhaseB|CatalogPhaseBDamage|WriteGate" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Excel.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Excel.Tests.csproj -v minimal
npx gitnexus impact PlatformWorkbookImporter --direction upstream
```

**Estimated test count**: ~10–14 (empty-diff golden, edit stage/approve, FK quarantine, stale snapshot, deletion diff, Phase A/B regression, ClosedXML parity)

**Sprint fails** if damage round-trip does not land — this story is the critical path gate.

---

### S25-06 Damage validator rule pack — Integration + Logic

**Test file path**: extend `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Platform/PlatformWorkbookValidatorTests.cs`; new `CatalogPhaseBDamageValidationTests.cs` if rule pack is separate

**What to test** (from kickoff AC + GDD 21 PLE-4.1–4.3 + GDD 06 DBI-2.1, DBI-2.2, DBI-3.1):
- HP bounds: `MaxHp` ≤ 0 or above ceiling → blocking finding (DBI-2.2)
- Withdraw threshold sanity: threshold > `MaxHp` or negative → blocking finding
- Flag sanity: invalid critical/withdraw flags → blocking finding with explainable code (PLE-4.1)
- FK/orphan guard: `PlatformId` must resolve; unknown platform → blocking finding before staging
- `ValidationReport` deterministic — golden hash pinned for fixture workbook (PLE-4.3, DBI-3.3)
- Blocking findings prevent `ApproveBatch` until resolved (PLE-4.2, DBI-7.2)
- Phase A + Phase B validation rules regression unchanged

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Workbook with correct headers but invalid withdraw threshold
- Damage row with negative `MaxHp`
- Mixed valid + invalid damage rows — all invalid quarantined, valid staged
- Empty validator input (zero damage rows) — PASS with empty report
- Threshold at boundary (0%, 100%) — documented expected behavior

**Filters / commands**:
```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "Platform|CatalogPhaseB|CatalogPhaseBDamage|Validation" -v minimal
```

**Estimated test count**: ~8–10 (HP bounds, withdraw threshold, flag sanity, FK guard, golden hash, blocking gate)

---

### S25-08 APP-6 glyph atlas MVP — UI + Integration + Visual

**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/Map/App6SidcMapGlyphTests.cs` (extend); new atlas-backed resolver tests if added

**What to test** (from kickoff AC + ADR-007 Phase C + ADR-010):
- `App6Sidc` expansion supports USS/atlas-backed map glyphs
- ≥2 distinct icons rendered via headless glyph resolver tests
- Map projection read-only — no writes to `DecisionLog` or sim world (ADR-007, ADR-010)
- Fallback for missing/invalid SIDC — placeholder, not crash
- Hostile vs friendly SIDC prefix — visually distinct shapes
- Spike doc with **PROCEED** verdict filed

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Symbol with missing `App6Sidc` — fallback glyph
- Map with zero symbols — harness PASS, no NRE
- Atlas frame load failure — degrade to unicode fallback

**Filters / commands**:
```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "PlayModeSmoke|Doctrine|MapPanelBinder|App6" -v minimal
rg "DelegationBridge" unity/ProjectAegis/Assets/Scripts/Runtime/ --glob "*App6*" --glob "*Map*"
npx gitnexus impact DelegationBridge --direction upstream
```

**Estimated test count**: ~5–8 (2 SIDC distinctness, atlas load, fallback, projection read-only)

### S25-09 Cesium Editor evidence — Visual + Integration

**What to test** (from kickoff AC + ADR-007 Phase B + ADR-010):
- `useGlobeMap=false` default on `DelegationSmoke` scene — CI/headless path unchanged
- Headless C2/map regression PASS with globe disabled
- `CesiumGlobeBridge` does not mutate sim/catalog state (read-only projection feed per ADR-010)

- Execute S24-08 manual protocol; capture `cesium-s25-*.png` in `production/qa/attachments/`

- `useGlobeMap=true` locally — globe loads without blocking headless CI default
- Missing Cesium ion token — graceful degrade, not crash (Editor)
- Depth/occlusion at Baltic bbox zoom levels (manual)
- Unit deselect — OOB panel clears

**Filters / commands**:
```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "PlayModeSmoke" -v minimal
rg "useGlobeMap" unity/ProjectAegis/Assets/Scenes/DelegationSmoke.unity
```

### S25-13 Damage sim consumer stub — Integration + Logic

**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests/Catalog/PhaseBDamageCatalogConsumerTests.cs` (new); extend detection/readiness trial tests; `ReplayGoldenSuiteTests.cs` (regression)

**What to test** (from kickoff AC + GDD 06 cross-domain + Req 18 catalog export only):
- `ICatalogReader.TryGetPlatformDamage` consumed by sim readiness/withdraw smoke stub
- Committed damage change affects readiness/withdraw trial outcome (stub only — no runtime BDA)
- Fixtures **without** damage data produce identical trial results (additive-only)
- Deterministic trial ordering — stable `OrderBy` on reads
- **`/replay-verify` PASS** mandatory before merge (6/6 `ReplayGoldenSuiteTests`)
- No `DelegationBridge` edits (sim consumer reads via `ICatalogReader` only per ADR-010)
- **No runtime damage application** — scope lock per sprint kickoff

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Platform with default-empty damage (TryGet returns false) — baseline readiness unchanged
- Withdraw threshold at boundary — stub applies predictably
- Catalog without damage tables (pre-migration fixture) — stub returns empty, trials unchanged
- Replay hash unchanged when damage data present but unreferenced by scenario units

**Filters / commands**:
```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "PhaseB|Damage|Readiness|Withdraw" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "ReplayGoldenSuiteTests" -v minimal
/replay-verify all
```

**Estimated test count**: ~6–8 (TryGet consumer, trial delta, legacy fixture unchanged, boundary threshold, replay regression)

**Mandatory gate**: `/replay-verify all` PASS on any merge touching `ProjectAegis.Sim` or catalog batch ordering affecting sim reads.

---

### S25-14 Cesium APP-6 billboards — Visual + Integration

**Test file path**: headless regression via `PlayModeSmoke` filter; extend globe bridge tests if headless mock exists

**What to test** (from kickoff AC + ADR-007 Phase B/C):
- Globe markers use `App6Sidc` affiliation for billboard rendering
- `useGlobeMap: 0` on `DelegationSmoke` — CI-safe default preserved
- Headless C2 regression PASS with globe disabled
- No sim/catalog mutation from globe billboard layer (ADR-010)
- Editor evidence updated if billboards land (advisory)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Missing SIDC on globe marker — fallback glyph
- Globe disabled — billboards not loaded, headless green
- S25-08 atlas dependency — billboards degrade if atlas MVP not landed

**Filters / commands**:
```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "PlayModeSmoke|App6" -v minimal
rg "useGlobeMap" unity/ProjectAegis/Assets/Scenes/DelegationSmoke.unity
```

**Estimated test count**: ~2–4 (headless smoke, affiliation mapping; remainder manual/advisory)

**Cut order**: First drop per sprint should-have cut line — not blocking sprint sign-off.

## Manual QA Checklist

### S25-05 Damage importer E2E — Integration + Logic

**Verification method**: CLI/manual workbook edit cycle

**Who must sign off**: team-data / qa-lead

**Evidence to capture**: `production/qa/sprint-25-phase-b-damage-e2e-*.md` with export path, edited `MaxHp` cell, diff summary, approve output, read-back values

- [ ] `platform_export_xlsx` produces workbook with populated Platforms damage columns from DB
- [ ] Edit one damage cell (e.g., `MaxHp`) offline in Excel/ClosedXML fixture
- [ ] `platform_import_xlsx` / `platform_diff_xlsx` shows exactly one damage edit
- [ ] `ApproveBatch` commits; `ICatalogReader.TryGetPlatformDamage` read-back matches edited value
- [ ] Unedited re-import of post-commit export yields empty diff (PLE-2.1)

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before any QA hand-off for this sprint (from kickoff Quality Gates + lean review mode):

```bash
export PATH="/home/username01/.dotnet:$PATH"

# Must — full solution (S25-01 day-1; re-run at closeout via S25-12)
dotnet build ProjectAegis.sln
dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal

# Data — Phase B damage + write gate
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "WriteGate|Platform|CatalogPhaseB|CatalogPhaseBDamage" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Excel.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Excel.Tests.csproj -v minimal

# Sim consumer (if S25-13 shipped)
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "PhaseB|Damage|Readiness|Withdraw" -v minimal

# Replay determinism (mandatory on sim-touching merges)
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "ReplayGoldenSuiteTests" -v minimal
/replay-verify all

# Unity — presentation regression (Buildkite blocking)
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "PlayModeSmoke|Doctrine|MapPanelBinder|App6" -v minimal

# Unity Editor (local) — ADVISORY tri-batch (S25-11)
pwsh tools/unity/Invoke-C2PlayModeSignoffBatch.ps1 -Scenario comms
pwsh tools/unity/Invoke-C2PlayModeSignoffBatch.ps1 -Scenario classify
pwsh tools/unity/Invoke-C2PlayModeSignoffBatch.ps1 -Scenario doctrine

# Pre-merge GitNexus
npx gitnexus impact CatalogWriteGate --direction upstream
npx gitnexus impact ICatalogReader --direction upstream
npx gitnexus impact PlatformWorkbookImporter --direction upstream
npx gitnexus detect_changes --repo cmano-clone
```

**Lean review mode notes:**
- **Blocking**: Buildkite `buildkite/cmano-clone` + scoped filters above
- **Advisory**: GitHub Actions CodeQL (billing); Unity Editor PNG/tri-batch evidence
- **Merge authority**: Headless PASS; Editor evidence clears advisory conditions only

**Numbered smoke paths:**

1. Game launches to main menu without crash (Unity smoke if Editor available)
2. New game / new session can be started
3. **S25-01**: Full `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln` — 0 failures, count ≥592 at day-1 and closeout; ReplayGolden 6/6
4. **S25-02→05 (must-have E2E)**: Export → edit `MaxHp` on Platforms sheet → import → approve → read-back; unedited round-trip empty diff on damage columns
5. **S25-04**: Write-gate `ApproveBatch` commits damage staging; sensor + Phase A/B paths regression green
6. **S25-06** (minimum shippable): Damage validator golden hash pinned; blocking findings on error fixture
7. **S25-07** (stretch merge): `Data.Excel.Tests` PASS after ClosedXML carryover
8. **S25-08** (if shipped): Headless App6 + MapPanel tests; ≥2 distinct glyphs
9. **S25-09** (if shipped): `useGlobeMap=false` on `DelegationSmoke`; headless smoke green; `cesium-s25-*.png` advisory
10. **S25-10** (minimum shippable): Doctrine batch PASS; EMCON read-only line; ZERO `DelegationBridge` touch
11. **S25-11** (if shipped): Tri-batch comms/classify/doctrine advisory; headless proxy mandatory PASS
12. Save / load cycle completes without data loss (catalog snapshot binding unchanged)
13. Performance within budget (no new frame spikes from xlsx I/O, map glyphs, or globe billboards)

**Stretch (nice-to-have — smoke only if landed; not blocking sprint sign-off):**
- **S25-13**: Damage sim consumer stub — `/replay-verify all` PASS; legacy fixtures unchanged
- **S25-14**: Cesium APP-6 billboards — affiliation mapping; `useGlobeMap: 0` preserved

*Smoke tests verified by developer via `/smoke-check sprint`. Reference this list and scoped filters when running that skill. Run before QA hand-off / Production → Polish gate.*

| S25-09 Cesium Editor evidence | Verify globe depth/occlusion at Baltic bbox; selection on globe syncs OOB panel; `useGlobeMap=false` CI path unaffected | 1 | Designer / unity-specialist |

| S25-11 C2 tri-batch sign-off | Verify comms/classify/doctrine PlayMode flows complete without regression; map + doctrine panels coherent after stretch merges | 1 | Designer / unity-specialist / experienced C2 operator |
| S25-14 Cesium APP-6 billboards | Verify globe markers show correct affiliation glyphs; selection sync intact | 1 | Designer / unity-specialist |

- `production/session-logs/playtest-sprint-25-cesium-evidence.md` (S25-09)

## Regression Risks

| Risk | Probability | Impact | Affected Stories | QA Mitigation |
|------|------------|--------|------------------|---------------|
| `CatalogWriteGate` CRITICAL extend-only violation | Medium | **CRITICAL** | S25-04, S25-05 | `gitnexus impact` before edit; sensor + Phase A/B regression tests mandatory first; code review extend-only |
| `ICatalogReader` HIGH blast radius — breaking additive API | Medium | High | S25-03, S25-13 | Default-empty implementations on `InMemoryCatalogReader`; impact-check before merge; Phase A/B reader regression suite |
| Damage scope creep into combat runtime / BDA | High | High | S25-05, S25-06, S25-13 | AC scope lock in PR review; tests assert Platforms sheet columns only; reject component-level damage tables |
| Locale/number parsing drift in Excel import | Medium | High | S25-05, S25-07 | `InvariantCulture` tests; empty-diff golden on binary `.xlsx`; ADR-011 compliance tests |
| Sim determinism break from damage consumer | Medium | **CRITICAL** | S25-13 | `/replay-verify all` mandatory; legacy fixture unchanged tests; `/determinism-audit` on sim-touching merges |
| `DelegationBridge` accidental edit | Low | **CRITICAL** | S25-08, S25-09, S25-10, S25-14 | ZERO touch grep + GitNexus impact; route via projection/command per ADR-010; reject PR on any `DelegationBridge` diff |
| Unity Editor unavailable for presentation sign-off | Medium | Medium | S25-09, S25-11, S25-14 | Headless proxy tests mandatory PASS; **APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS** until Editor evidence captured (lean mode) |
| S24-10 / S24-11 merge conflicts with damage schema | Medium | Medium | S25-07, S25-10 | Land stretch merges early (day 2–3) parallel to damage schema; re-run `Data.Excel` golden after Platforms column shift |
| Full-sln latent failures post-S24 | Low | High | S25-01 | Day-1 gate blocks feature work; triage before claiming green |
| Replay golden drift at closeout | Medium | High | S25-13, S25-12 | Document `--record` rationale; no silent golden updates |
| Cesium Editor-only validation gap | Medium | Medium | S25-09, S25-14 | Headless gates remain merge authority; `useGlobeMap=false` on CI scene |
| GitHub Actions billing / CodeQL advisory fail | Medium | Low | S25-12 | Document permanent advisory status; Buildkite remains blocking |
| Index stale post-merge | Medium | Medium | S25-12 | `gitnexus analyze --force` @ stack tip before closeout |
| Producer damage schema delay | Medium | High | S25-02 | Day-1 producer sign-off gate; block S25-02 until column set approved |

**Req 13 Doctrine regression scope (S25-10, S25-11):**
- AC6 headless identical policy denial sequence — guarded by `Doctrine` filter + replay suite
- AC2 `FireAbortReason.ROE_HOLD_FIRE` — existing headless tests, no new doctrine features
- `RunDoctrineBatch` must remain PASS after EMCON panel and tri-batch changes

---

## GitNexus Verification Gates

Mandatory per kickoff GitNexus Rules and AGENTS.md — run **before ANY symbol edit** and document in story PR / evidence:

| Symbol / Area | Risk | Story | Gate |
|---------------|------|-------|------|
| `CatalogWriteGate` | CRITICAL | S25-04, S25-05 | `npx gitnexus impact CatalogWriteGate --direction upstream` — **extend-only**; sensor + Phase A/B regression mandatory |
| `ICatalogReader` | HIGH | S25-03, S25-13 | `npx gitnexus impact ICatalogReader --direction upstream` — additive API only |
| `PlatformWorkbookImporter` | HIGH | S25-05 | Impact upstream before damage column wiring |
| `IPlatformWorkbookIo` | HIGH | S25-05, S25-07 | Impact upstream before ClosedXML UX merge |
| `DelegationBridge` | CRITICAL (ZERO touch) | S25-08, S25-09, S25-10, S25-14 | `npx gitnexus impact DelegationBridge --direction upstream` — no edits |
| Repo-wide | — | S25-01, S25-12, closeout | `npx gitnexus analyze --force` @ stack tip; `detect_changes` before each commit |

**Pre-work (day 0)**:
1. `npx gitnexus analyze .` @ trunk HEAD `9ecbf2c`
2. Baseline impacts documented for all CRITICAL/HIGH symbols above
3. `/replay-verify all` kickoff baseline report (6/6)
4. S25-01 full-solution gate before feature branches merge
5. Producer damage column schema sign-off before S25-02

**Post-edit**: `detect_changes` must show expected blast radius only; unexpected `DelegationBridge` touch or write-gate bypass = **BLOCK**.

**Lean mode**: GitNexus Security Checks on GHA may fail advisory (billing) — local `analyze` + `impact` evidence still mandatory in PR.

## QA Sign-Off Criteria

Sprint 25 receives **APPROVED** QA sign-off when ALL of the following are true:

### Must-have (blocking)

- [ ] **S25-01**: Day-1 and closeout `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln` — 0 failures, count ≥592, ReplayGolden 6/6; evidence in `production/qa/smoke-sprint-25-*.md`
- [ ] **S25-02**: Migration `009` idempotent; Baltic fixture seeded; `CatalogPlatformDamage` types; no new workbook sheets; producer schema sign-off archived
- [ ] **S25-03**: `ICatalogReader.TryGetPlatformDamage` PASS; export includes Platforms damage columns; `CatalogPhaseBDamage` filter green
- [ ] **S25-04**: `ProposePlatformDamageBatch` + `ApproveBatch`/`RejectBatch` PASS; sensor + Phase A/B regression unchanged; GitNexus extend-only evidence archived
- [ ] **S25-05**: Damage importer empty-diff golden PASS; at least one `MaxHp` E2E edit cycle documented; FK quarantine verified
- [ ] Phase B damage E2E documented: export → edit → import → approve → read-back (Platforms sheet minimum)
- [ ] Full-solution gate green at closeout (≥592)
- [ ] No S1 or S2 bugs in delivered must-have features
- [ ] Tracker row 21 updated for **Phase B complete** (damage columns)
- [ ] Code reviewed and merged to `main`
- [ ] Buildkite `buildkite/cmano-clone` green on merge stack

### Should-have (required if story shipped; waived if explicitly deferred)

- [ ] **S25-06**: Damage validator golden hash pinned; HP bounds + withdraw threshold + flag sanity verified on error fixture
- [ ] **S25-07**: S24-11 ClosedXML merge PASS; `Data.Excel.Tests` green; golden updated if Platforms columns shifted
- [ ] **S25-08**: Headless App6 + MapPanel tests PASS; ≥2 distinct glyphs evidenced; spike PROCEED doc filed; ZERO `DelegationBridge` touch
- [ ] **S25-09**: `cesium-s25-*.png` in attachments; headless smoke PASS; S24-08 advisory condition cleared
- [ ] **S25-10**: EMCON read-only panel merged; Doctrine batch PASS; ZERO `DelegationBridge` touch
- [ ] **S25-11**: Tri-batch log archived (advisory); headless `PlayModeSmoke|Doctrine|MapPanelBinder` green; no `SIGNOFF_ERROR`

### Nice-to-have (waived without blocking if cut)

- [ ] **S25-13**: Sim consumer tests PASS; `/replay-verify all` PASS; legacy fixtures unchanged
- [ ] **S25-14**: Cesium APP-6 billboards; Editor evidence updated; `useGlobeMap: 0` on DelegationSmoke

### Closeout (S25-12 or equivalent)

- [ ] `/replay-verify all` 6/6 PASS (or approved `--record` with evidence)
- [ ] `production/qa/sprint-25-gitnexus-*.md` with analyze + detect_changes @ stack tip
- [ ] Smoke check passed (`/smoke-check sprint`)
- [ ] QA sign-off report: **APPROVED** or **APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS** (`/team-qa sprint`)
- [ ] Stale `stack/sprint24/*` branches pruned or documented

### APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS (allowed only when — lean review mode)

- Unity Editor unavailable: headless tests PASS + waiver documented + unity-specialist sign-off; Editor evidence (`cesium-s25-*.png`, tri-batch log) due before Production → Polish gate
- S25-11 deferred: headless proxy PASS; tri-batch evidence scoped out with producer ack
- S25-13 deferred: must-have damage path (S25-02–05) still APPROVED; replay-verify still PASS (no sim changes)
- GHA CodeQL advisory fail: Buildkite green + local GitNexus evidence sufficient
- Presentation cut line exercised: S25-14 dropped; S25-08/09/10 minimum landed per should-have cut line

### Automatic FAIL conditions

- Any edit to `DelegationBridge.cs` without explicit architecture waiver
- `CatalogWriteGate` sensor commit path regression failure
- Damage round-trip (S25-05) does not land — **sprint fails**
- `/replay-verify` FAIL on sim-touching merge without approved golden update
- Full-solution test count drops below 592 with unexplained failures
- Direct-SQL or auto-commit import path discovered (PLE-3.1 / DBI-8.3 violation)
- Runtime damage application / BDA code merged (scope violation)
- Component-level damage tables introduced (scope violation)

| Requirement / ADR | Stories | Key ACs / Rules |
|-------------------|---------|-----------------|
| Req 21 Platform Editor | S25-02–06 | PLE-1.3 stable sort; PLE-2.1 empty-diff on damage columns; PLE-2.3 FK quarantine; PLE-3.1 write-gate only; PLE-4.1–4.3 damage validation |
| Req 06 Database Intelligence | S25-02–06, S25-13 | DBI-1.1 cache refresh; DBI-1.4 no orphan staging; DBI-2.4 bulk threshold; DBI-4.4 reject unchanged; platform HP export (P1) |
| Req 13 Doctrine (regression) | S25-10, S25-11 | AC6 determinism; AC2 ROE hold fire; `RunDoctrineBatch` PASS; EMCON read-only display |
| Req 18 Combat Domains (catalog only) | S25-13 | Platform HP + critical flags in catalog export; **no runtime damage application** |
| ADR-011 Excel round-trip (Accepted) | S25-02–07 | Empty-diff golden; write-gate parity; `InvariantCulture`; ClosedXML behind port; Platforms sheet damage columns |
| ADR-010 Headless-first UI (Accepted) | S25-08–11, S25-14 | Map/globe read-only projections; ZERO touch DelegationBridge; lean mode headless = merge authority |
| ADR-007 C2 Map Presentation (Accepted) | S25-08, S25-09, S25-14 | Phase C APP-6 glyphs/atlas; Phase B Cesium globe; `MapSymbolEntry` / `App6Sidc` contract |

## Risk / Fallback Matrix

| Risk | QA Mitigation | Fallback |
|------|---------------|----------|
| S25-04 slips past day 5 | Day-1 S25-01 gate; serial data stack after schema | Cut S25-11, then S25-14; narrow S25-08 to USS frames only |
| S25-05 damage E2E fails | Empty-diff golden + FK guard tests first | **Sprint fails** — no fallback; scope cannot shrink |
| S25-13 sim consumer too risky | Replay-verify gate; legacy fixture tests | Defer S25-13; damage import/commit still closes tracker row 21 |
| APP-6 atlas inconclusive | Spike verdict doc required | Land headless unicode fallback only; defer atlas to Sprint 26 |
| Cesium Editor blocked | `useGlobeMap=false` keeps CI green | Defer S25-09/14; headless APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS |
| S24-11 ClosedXML merge conflicts | Land S25-07 early day 2–3 | Defer S25-07; damage path unaffected |
| S24-10 EMCON merge conflicts | Land S25-10 early parallel to damage | Defer S25-10; minimum shippable requires retry or waiver |
| Unity Editor unavailable | Headless proxy mandatory PASS | APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS; Editor evidence before Production → Polish |
| Producer schema sign-off delayed | Block S25-02 explicitly | Use interim column set from ADR-011 draft with producer ack in writing |
| GitHub Actions billing | CI hygiene doc in S25-12 | Permanent advisory; Buildkite blocking |

## Collaborative Notes

- Stories inline in kickoff — no separate epic story files yet; ACs sourced from `sprint-25-phase-b-damage-assurance.md` + `sprint25_stories` in `production/sprint-status.yaml`.
- S24 foundation: Phase B Mobility/Signatures/Emcon reader/import/commit/validate complete; migration 008; Sprint 25 adds **damage columns** (migration 009) to close ADR-011 Phase B / tracker row 21.
- Trunk @ `9ecbf2c`; S24 baseline **592/592 PASS**; ReplayGolden **6/6**.
- **Lean review mode**: Buildkite = merge authority; GHA CodeQL advisory (billing); Unity Editor PNG/tri-batch = advisory gates clearing S24 carry-over conditions.
- **Stretch merges**: S24-10 → S25-10 (`doctrine-emcon-readonly`); S24-11 → S25-07 (`closedxml-phase-b-ux`); land early day 2–3 to avoid conflict with damage schema.
- **Explicitly out of scope**: CMO catalog Phase 2 import; C5 human override UX; runtime damage application / BDA; component-level damage tables; in-engine platform viewer (ADR-011 Phase C).
- Parallel worktree layout per kickoff: data stack serial after S25-01; Unity tracks parallel (APP-6 atlas, Cesium evidence, EMCON merge).
- Track plans: `production/agentic/sprint-25-plan-{data,unity,qa}-2026-06-17.md`.
